H3: What production times do you offer, and when does turnaround start? ================================================== PRODUCT HEADER ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Styrene Signs for Indoor & Outdoor Business Display

Durable PVC Plastic Signs with UV-Resistant Printing & Custom Sizing

PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Material Thickness Sign Size Production Time Upload Artwork PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Lightweight Styrene Signs for Professional Indoor & Outdoor Display

Styrene signs are printed on durable 0.03" or 0.06" thick PVC plastic sheets, designed for professional business applications. These lightweight, flexible signs deliver exceptional print quality with UV-resistant inks that maintain vibrant colors for 3-5 years when properly installed outdoors.

Our custom styrene signs are ideal for indoor and outdoor business displays, offering professional-grade durability at an affordable price point. The flexible 0.03" material can be rolled for convenient storage and shipping, while the rigid 0.06" option provides enhanced stability for permanent installations.

Maximum Size: 4 feet x 8 feet
Material Options: 0.03" flexible or 0.06" rigid PVC plastic
Durability: UV-resistant inks withstand outdoor exposure for 3-5 years
Installation: Suitable for both indoor and outdoor mounting

** All Styrene signs over 32" x 48" in either direction will be shipped via freight. For more information on freight pricing, please visit our oversized flat shipping page or contact customer service at 320-391-5300. **

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

PVC Styrene Sign Material for Indoor & Outdoor Installation

Our styrene signs are manufactured using high-quality PVC plastic sheets available in two thickness options to meet your specific installation requirements.

0.03" Flexible Styrene Material

This ultra-flexible option is perfect for temporary displays and applications requiring rolled storage. The lightweight material can be easily transported and installed while maintaining excellent print quality and durability.

  • Extremely flexible - can be rolled for storage and shipping
  • Lightweight for easy handling and installation
  • Ideal for temporary displays and portable signage
  • Ships conveniently in tubes for protection

0.06" Rigid Styrene Material

The thicker, more rigid option provides enhanced stability for permanent installations and professional displays where a flat, stable surface is essential.

  • Rigid construction prevents warping and maintains flatness
  • Professional appearance for permanent installations
  • Enhanced durability for high-traffic areas
  • Cannot be rolled - ships flat for protection

UV-Resistant Ink Technology

Both material options feature our advanced UV-resistant printing technology that maintains vibrant colors and sharp detail for 3-5 years of outdoor exposure when properly installed and maintained.

Request a sample packet of materials

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing Options for Professional Styrene Sign Display

Our styrene signs are available with professional finishing options to ensure optimal performance for your specific installation requirements.

Standard Finishing

All styrene signs include precision cutting to your exact specifications with clean, professional edges ready for immediate installation.

  • Precision cut to exact dimensions
  • Clean, smooth edges
  • Ready for mounting upon arrival
  • No additional finishing required

Custom Shape Cutting

Create unique, eye-catching displays with custom die-cut shapes that match your brand or design requirements.

  • Custom shapes and contours available
  • Professional die-cutting precision
  • Ideal for logos and unique branding
  • Enhanced visual impact for displays

Double-Sided Printing

Maximize your display effectiveness with double-sided printing options for signs that will be viewed from multiple angles.

  • Full-color printing on both sides
  • Perfect for window displays
  • Ideal for freestanding installations
  • Same UV-resistant ink quality on both sides

Installation Considerations

Styrene signs can be mounted using various methods including adhesive backing, mounting holes, or professional mounting hardware depending on your installation requirements.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Styrene Sign Production & Turnaround Times

We offer flexible production schedules to meet your timeline requirements, from rush orders to budget-friendly extended turnarounds. All production times are calculated from artwork approval and file upload completion.

1 Business Day Priority Production

Perfect for urgent projects with tight deadlines.

  • Fastest turnaround available
  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST processed next business day
  • Emergency same-day rushes available in select cases
  • Contact customer service for same-day availability

2 Business Days Express Production

Ideal balance of speed and value for time-sensitive projects.

  • Quick turnaround with enhanced quality control
  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST processed next business day
  • Popular choice for business events and promotions
  • Additional quality review time included

3 Business Days Standard Production

Our most popular option combining speed with cost-effectiveness.

  • Free production option for most orders
  • Optimal balance of quality and turnaround
  • Sufficient time for detailed quality control
  • Perfect for planned installations and events

5+ Business Days Saver Production

Cost-effective option for non-urgent projects.

  • Maximum cost savings on production
  • Ideal for advance planning and budget-conscious projects
  • Full quality control and attention to detail
  • Perfect for seasonal campaigns and planned installations

Production Notes: Turnaround begins when artwork upload is complete. Orders flagged in prepress or requiring proof approval will begin production upon final approval. Contact customer service at 320-391-5300 for emergency rush options.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Styrene Sign Payment & Ordering Options

All styrene signs must be paid in full prior to production to ensure immediate processing once your artwork is approved.

Accepted Payment Methods

We accept all major credit cards and alternative payment options for your convenience:

  • Credit Cards: Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Discover
  • Check Payments: Personal and business checks accepted
  • ACH/Bank Transfer: Available for larger orders
  • Purchase Orders: Net terms available for qualified businesses

Payment Processing

Your payment will be processed according to the following schedule:

  • Credit cards charged upon order approval
  • Check orders held until payment clears
  • No charges applied during design or proof review stages
  • Full payment required before production begins

Order Security

All payment information is processed through secure, encrypted connections to protect your financial data throughout the ordering process.

Business Accounts

Qualified businesses may apply for net payment terms and purchase order processing. Contact customer service at 320-391-5300 to establish business account terms.

For detailed information about check processing and business payment terms, please review our payment policies or contact customer service for personalized assistance.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Custom Styrene Sign Delivery

We provide reliable shipping options to ensure your styrene signs arrive safely and on time for your installation schedule.

Standard Shipping Methods

Unless otherwise specified, orders ship via UPS Ground with full tracking capabilities:

  • UPS Ground: Standard shipping for most orders
  • UPS 2nd Day Air: Expedited delivery available
  • UPS Next Day Air: Overnight delivery for urgent projects
  • Freight Shipping: Required for oversized signs

Packaging Protection

Your styrene signs are carefully packaged to prevent damage during transit:

  • 0.03" Flexible Signs: Rolled and shipped in protective tubes
  • 0.06" Rigid Signs: Flat-packed with protective backing
  • Large Format Signs: Custom packaging for oversized orders
  • Multiple Signs: Individual protection for each sign

Freight Shipping Requirements

Signs exceeding the following dimensions require freight shipping:

  • Any sign over 32" x 48" in either direction
  • Any sign where Height + Width equals 81 inches or greater
  • All 0.06" rigid signs over the size limits
  • Multiple sign orders exceeding size/weight limits

Shipping Costs & Tracking

Shipping costs are calculated by package weight and destination. You'll receive tracking information once your order ships, and all carrier terms apply for delivery scheduling.

For questions about shipping options or freight pricing, contact customer service at 320-391-5300 before placing your order.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Indoor & Outdoor Business Uses for Styrene Signs

Styrene signs provide versatile display solutions for a wide range of business and promotional applications, offering professional appearance with exceptional durability.

Indoor Business Applications

Perfect for professional indoor environments requiring clean, modern signage:

  • Retail Displays: Product promotions, sale announcements, and brand messaging
  • Office Signage: Directional signs, department identification, and corporate branding
  • Trade Show Displays: Booth graphics, product information, and company messaging
  • Restaurant Menus: Menu boards, daily specials, and promotional displays
  • Real Estate: Property information, open house signs, and development marketing

Outdoor Business Applications

UV-resistant inks ensure long-lasting performance in outdoor installations:

  • Storefront Signage: Business hours, services offered, and promotional messaging
  • Construction Sites: Safety information, project details, and contractor identification
  • Event Signage: Temporary displays for festivals, markets, and outdoor events
  • Parking & Directional: Wayfinding, parking instructions, and facility information
  • Political Campaigns: Candidate promotion and ballot issue advocacy

Specialized Applications

Unique properties make styrene ideal for specific professional uses:

  • Photography Backgrounds: Clean, printable surface for professional shoots
  • Educational Displays: Classroom materials, presentations, and informational graphics
  • Healthcare Facilities: Patient information, safety protocols, and wayfinding
  • Government Applications: Public notices, regulatory information, and facility signage

The lightweight, durable nature of styrene signs makes them ideal for both temporary and permanent installations across diverse business environments.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Styrene Sign Artwork Requirements for Professional Printing

Proper artwork preparation ensures optimal print quality and professional results for your custom styrene signs. Our prepress team reviews all files to guarantee the best possible output.

Recommended File Formats

Vector-based files produce the highest quality results for styrene sign printing:

  • Adobe Illustrator (.ai): Preferred format with fonts converted to outlines
  • Encapsulated PostScript (.eps): Vector format with embedded fonts
  • High-Resolution PDF: Print-ready with embedded fonts and images
  • High-Resolution JPEG: Minimum 300 DPI at final print size

Artwork Preparation Guidelines

Follow these specifications to ensure professional printing results:

  • Resolution: 300 DPI minimum for raster images
  • Color Mode: CMYK for accurate color reproduction
  • Fonts: Convert all fonts to outlines or embed in PDF
  • Bleed: Include 0.125" bleed for signs with background colors
  • Safe Area: Keep important elements 0.25" from edges

Professional Design Services

Our experienced graphic design team can assist with artwork creation and optimization:

  • Custom design creation from your specifications
  • Logo recreation and vector conversion
  • File format conversion and optimization
  • Color matching and correction services

Proofing Options

Ensure accuracy before production with our proofing services:

  • Digital Proof: Low-resolution preview with order summary
  • Color Match Proof: Physical proof for color-critical projects
  • Order Verification: Complete order review including specifications

Color Matching Services

For color-critical projects, our Color Match Proof System provides the most accurate color representation. Contact customer service to discuss color matching requirements for your specific project.

If you're unsure about your artwork quality or need assistance with file preparation, our professional graphic designers are available to help ensure optimal results for your styrene sign project.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Design & Order Custom Styrene Signs Online

Ready to create professional styrene signs for your business? Our streamlined ordering process makes it easy to get exactly what you need, whether you have print-ready artwork or need complete design services.

Three Simple Ways to Get Started

Upload Your Print-Ready Artwork

Step 1: Select your preferred styrene material thickness and sign dimensions
Step 2: Upload your print-ready file directly from your computer
Step 3: Review and approve your order for immediate production

Let Our Designers Create Your Sign

Step 1: Choose your styrene sign specifications and size requirements
Step 2: Upload reference images, logos, or existing design elements
Step 3: Provide detailed design instructions for our professional team

Work with Our Design Team

Our experienced graphic designers specialize in creating effective styrene signage that delivers results. From concept to completion, we'll work with you to develop signage that meets your exact specifications and budget requirements.

Why Choose Professional Styrene Signs?

  • Proven Durability: UV-resistant inks maintain vibrant colors for 3-5 years outdoors
  • Flexible Options: Choose from lightweight flexible or rigid styrene materials
  • Custom Sizing: Available up to 4' x 8' to meet any application requirement
  • Fast Turnaround: Production options from 1-5 business days
  • Professional Quality: Commercial-grade materials and printing processes

Questions about your styrene sign project? Our customer service team is available Monday-Friday 8AM-4PM CST at 320-391-5300, or contact us online anytime for personalized assistance with your custom signage needs.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions

What are styrene signs?

Styrene signs are printed on lightweight PVC plastic sheets available in 0.03" flexible or 0.06" rigid thicknesses. These durable signs feature UV-resistant inks and are suitable for both indoor and outdoor applications, providing 3-5 years of outdoor durability when properly installed.

Can I order custom-shaped styrene signs?

Yes, we offer custom die-cutting services for unique shapes and designs. Custom-shaped styrene signs are perfect for logos, branded displays, and creative applications that require more than standard rectangular formats.

Can styrene signs be printed double-sided?

Absolutely! Double-sided printing is available for styrene signs that will be viewed from multiple angles. This option is ideal for window displays, freestanding installations, and applications where both sides of the sign will be visible.

What colors are used to print styrene signs?

We use full-color CMYK printing with UV-resistant inks that maintain vibrant colors and sharp detail. Our printing process can reproduce virtually any color and supports full-color photographic images, gradients, and complex graphics.

Can styrene signs be used outdoors?

Yes, styrene signs can be used outdoors. While we recommend indoor use for maximum longevity, our UV-resistant inks allow outdoor installation with 3-5 years of color retention when properly installed and maintained.

How should I store styrene signs?

Store styrene signs in a clean, dry environment away from direct sunlight and extreme temperatures. Flexible 0.03" signs can be rolled for compact storage, while rigid 0.06" signs should be stored flat to prevent warping or damage.

What are common uses for styrene signs?

Styrene signs are versatile for retail displays, office signage, trade show graphics, restaurant menus, real estate marketing, construction site signage, event displays, and educational materials. They're ideal for both temporary and permanent installations.

Can I request a proof before printing?

Yes, we offer digital proofs that include a low-resolution image preview and complete order summary. For color-critical projects, we also provide physical Color Match Proofs to ensure accurate color reproduction before final production.

What production times do you offer, and when does turnaround start?

We offer 1, 2, 3, and 5+ business day production options. Turnaround begins when your artwork upload is complete and approved. Orders requiring prepress review or proof approval begin production upon final approval confirmation.
